responses: Hello! Welcome to NAUB Student Assistant.
Hi there! How can I help you today?

patterns: how do I register for courses
responses: Course registration usually starts at the beginning of the semester. Check the NAUB portal for exact dates.
Exams usually begin at the end of the semester. Please see the NAUB academic calendar for details.

patterns: how do I pay school fees
responses: School fees can be paid through the NAUB portal or approved banks.

patterns: where is the faculty of computing
responses: The Faculty of Computing is located on the main campus, beside the library.
